name: Bombabarbardeer
description: Bombabarbardeer is a Bandit multi-barrel rocket launcher that consumes 1 ammo to fire a three-rocket spread. It behaves like a shotgun at close to mid range, making it easier to land hits on large targets or groups. The magazine size is generous for its tier, but individual rockets hit lightly and reloads are slow. Damage is strongest when all three rockets connect.
notes: Can appear as a standard world drop from appropriate loot sources.
